ddls:
CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "location_code" TEXT /* Code for the location (e.g., ES026C) */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country code for the location (e.g., ES) */,
  "region_code" TEXT /* Region code for the location (e.g., EU) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude of the location */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Current estimated population of the location */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the location data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the indicator */,
  "indicator_code" TEXT /* Code for the indicator (e.g., HHSIZE) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the indicator (e.g., Demographics, Economy) */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit of measurement */,
  "scale_id" INTEGER /* ID of the scale */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the indicator data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL to the data source for reference */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., Government, International Organization) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data source information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit */,
  "unit_description" TEXT /* Description of the unit */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation for the unit (e.g., K) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the unit information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scales" (
  "scale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scale */,
  "scale_name" TEXT /* Name of the scale */,
  "scale_description" TEXT /* Description of the scale */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation for the scale (e.g., PPP) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the scale information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scale_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "measurement_name" TEXT /* Name of the measurement */,
  "measurement_description" TEXT /* Description of the measurement */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation for the measurement (e.g., 5YR) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the measurement information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_points" (
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the indicator */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data point */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the data point */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit of measurement */,
  "scale_id" INTEGER /* ID of the scale */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "date_of_data" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data point was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES indicators ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_scale_id FOREIGN KEY ("scale_id") REFERENCES scales ("scale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_source_links" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link */,
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "date_of_last_update" TEXT /* Date of last update */,
  "note_id" INTEGER /* ID of the note (if any) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the link information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_source_links_data_point_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_point_id") REFERENCES data_points ("data_point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_source_links_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_source_links_note_id FOREIGN KEY ("note_id") REFERENCES notes ("note_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the note was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notes_data_point_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_point_id") REFERENCES data_points ("data_point_id")
)
